7 License Page — Key Discovery
joy Confidence 0.85

"Footer — LEGAL section: Terms of services, Privacy policy, and Licenses. There it is. TL;DR: Personal License — Build unlimited projects as an individual. Section 1.1: 'Create unlimited projects. Build and develop applications or websites for personal use OR COMMERCIAL USE.' That's the green light. Only restriction is I can't resell the boilerplate itself. $199 for unlimited commercial projects — I'm in."

⚠ Critical commercial use license buried in footer — 7 steps to find it
